headline.purpose: Current session title and primary screen heading.

title.purpose: Project names, message authors, and component headings.

body.purpose: Chat copy and standard UI text.

label.purpose: Status labels, compact pills, metadata headings.

code.purpose: Paths, commands, snippets, and tool output.

shadows.name: ambient-transcript
shadows.purpose: Message bubbles and contained transcript elements.

shadows.name: active-micro-glow
shadows.purpose: Streaming pills and live status dots.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action with flat dark surface and external violet glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(20% 0.034 286); color: oklch(96% 0.01 286); border: 1px solid oklch(75% 0.19 286 / 0.28); border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font: 600 0.875rem/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 0 20px oklch(62% 0.22 286 / 0.18), 0 0 44px oklch(62% 0.22 286 / 0.08); transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(22% 0.044 286); border-color: oklch(86% 0.12 286 / 0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 28px oklch(62% 0.22 286 / 0.24), 0 0 56px oklch(62% 0.22 286 / 0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(75% 0.19 286); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet utility action without persistent glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: oklch(82% 0.015 286); border: 1px solid oklch(32% 0.026 286); border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font: 500 0.875rem/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(23% 0.02 286); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(75% 0.19 286); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Session Row
components.description: Active session row in project tree.
components.css: .ds-session-row { width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; text-align: left; background: oklch(20% 0.028 286); color: oklch(96% 0.01 286); border: 0; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.625rem; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(70% 0.16 286 / 0.12), 0 0 18px oklch(62% 0.22 286 / 0.10); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-session-dot { width: 0.375rem; height: 0.375rem; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(75% 0.19 286); box-shadow: 0 0 16px oklch(75% 0.19 286); } .ds-session-row strong { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-session-row small { display: block; margin-top: 0.125rem; color: oklch(58% 0.017 286); font-size: 0.68rem; } .ds-session-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(75% 0.19 286); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Assistant Message
components.html:
pi

Reading router and layout conventions before editing.
components.css: .ds-message { max-width: 75ch; background: oklch(18% 0.018 286); color: oklch(86% 0.014 286); border: 1px solid oklch(29% 0.025 286); border-radius: 1.25rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; box-shadow: 0 18px 60px oklch(8% 0.02 286 / 0.22); font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-message-label { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; color: oklch(65% 0.035 286); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-message p { margin: 0; }

components.name: Composer Field
components.css: .ds-composer { display: block; background: oklch(18% 0.018 286); border: 1px solid oklch(31% 0.026 286); border-radius: 1.25rem; box-shadow: 0 18px 80px oklch(8% 0.02 286 / 0.28); overflow: hidden; } .ds-composer span { position: absolute; inline-size: 1px; block-size: 1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0); } .ds-composer textarea { width: 100%; min-height: 7rem; resize: none; background: transparent; color: oklch(92% 0.012 286); border: 0; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-composer textarea::placeholder { color: oklch(55% 0.018 286); } .ds-composer:focus-within { border-color: oklch(75% 0.19 286 / 0.6); box-shadow: 0 18px 80px oklch(8% 0.02 286 / 0.28), 0 0 0 2px oklch(75% 0.19 286 / 0.20); } .ds-composer textarea:focus { outline: none; }

narrative.overview: PiLot should feel like a quiet control surface in a dark room: compact, legible, and precise, with enough light to identify the active system state without turning the product into a neon poster. The current visual language is a dark violet-tinted product UI with one accent family, restrained surfaces, dense spacing, and external glow used only on active or primary affordances.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, violet-tinted neutral shell with no pure black and no pure white.
Tonal layering first; glow only for active or primary accents.
Full-height app shell where navigation and transcript scroll independently.
Functional copy, visible state, and no decorative gradients on broad backgrounds.

rules.name: The One Light Rule
rules.body: Violet is the only luminous accent. If a second glow hue appears, remove it unless it is a semantic warning or success state.

rules.name: The No Sun Rule
rules.body: No large radial glows, blobs, hero halos, or atmospheric circles behind the interface. Glow belongs to small controls and active states only.

rules.name: The No Broad Gradient Rule
rules.body: Page backgrounds, chat backgrounds, and large panels stay flat. Gradients are not the system; controlled external light is.

rules.name: The Native Tool Rule
rules.body: Use one system sans family for UI. Do not introduce display fonts, decorative type, or marketing-style type contrast into the product shell.

rules.name: The Layer Before Light Rule
rules.body: Use surface lightness and borders before shadows. Add glow only when it clarifies active state or primary action.

dos: Do keep the app as a full-height cockpit with independent sidebar and transcript scrolling.
Do use OKLCH values for new UI color work.
Do keep project, session, model, context, and safety state visible where relevant.
Do use violet glow only for active/primary accents: logo, send button, live session dot, streaming chip.
Do keep chat input pinned to the bottom of the viewport.
donts: Don't use hacker neon or over-stylized terminal cosplay.
Don't use large radial glows, blobs, suns, or atmospheric circles.
Don't put gradients on page backgrounds, chat windows, or broad panels.
